releaseNotes: • Fix: on very large sources (600k+ EPG programmes), channel searches could still stall for 30+ seconds while SQLite checkpointed a 1GB write-ahead log — even after the fix in 1.17.8. EPG programme data is now stored in a separate database file (epg.sqlite), so its write-ahead log never blocks the channel-search database. Searches stay fast throughout any EPG refresh.
